Home / About

Machinery engineering from Foshan since 1998

Foshan Gaoming Hongyi Machinery Co., Ltd. has a 60,000 m2 Foshan production base and export experience in film, PVC, tarpaulin and synthetic leather machinery.

Share material, width, speed, power supply and factory country. An engineer can reply with a practical configuration.

No. 1 Sanhe Road, Cangjiang Industrial Park, Gaoming District, Foshan, Guangdong, China

Quotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production.

No. 1 Sanhe Road, Cangjiang Industrial Park, Gaoming District, Foshan, Guangdong, China
